name: Cellular Automata Showcase
description: Known Game of Life patterns and CA rules that fit the 7x30 display

patterns.name: Glider
patterns.description: Travels diagonally across the display, wrapping at edges

patterns.name: Lightweight Spaceship (LWSS)
patterns.description: Moves horizontally — wider than a glider

patterns.name: R-pentomino
patterns.description: 5 cells that evolve chaotically for 1000+ generations

patterns.name: Acorn
patterns.description: 7 cells that take 5206 generations to stabilize

patterns.name: Block + Glider
patterns.description: A glider approaches a still-life block — watch what happens

patterns.name: Rule 30
patterns.description: Wolfram's favorite — generates chaos from order

patterns.name: Rule 90 (Sierpinski)
patterns.description: XOR rule — produces Sierpinski triangle fractal

patterns.name: Rule 110
patterns.description: Turing-complete — complex structures from simple rules

patterns.name: Rule 184 (Traffic)
patterns.description: Models traffic flow — particles move right

patterns.name: Brian's Brain Soup
patterns.description: Random initial state — watch the trails form and die

patterns.name: Cyclic Waves (4 states)
patterns.description: Spiral waves emerge from random noise
